criteria.text: GET /api/auth/scopes returns granted scope names (requested + delegated scp + app roles); the access token is never in the response or logs
Token-safe decode: a malformed/missing token yields empty arrays and never throws; only scope names are surfaced, never the token
Connections page shows the granted Microsoft scopes read-only and a muted note when Sites.Read.All is absent (SharePoint files need it; OneDrive works); no note when present
